title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DeHaat International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DeHaat International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the DeHaat International Enterprises family as a Backend Developer in Amritsar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DeHaat International Enterprises:
DeHaat International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat International Enterprises!
